intro: The dunes shimmer ahead, and a cool blue oasis wavers into view between them, fringed with impossible palms.
title: The Mirage
description: A shimmering oasis beckons across the sand. {{tell}}

1.label: Search the mirage
1.tooltip:
(+) With a sharp-eyed Pokemon: dig up a real cache (Ultra + Great)
(?) Without one: only a single Great find
1.selected: You walk into the shimmering haze where the water should be...

2.label: Move on
2.selected: You know better than to chase water in the desert, and press on.

resultSeer: Guided by your Pokemon's senses, you brush away the sand and uncover a cache the mirage was hiding!
resultBlind: The oasis melts into empty air, but your digging turns up one thing worth keeping.
